openai_ui._comment: ChatGPT via browser automation (Playwright). No API key needed.

claude._comment: Anthropic Claude. Requires: pip install anthropic

gemini._comment: Google Gemini. Requires: pip install google-generativeai

groq._comment: Groq fast inference. Requires: pip install groq

qwen._comment: Alibaba Qwen via DashScope (OpenAI-compatible). Requires: pip install openai

perplexity._comment: Perplexity AI (OpenAI-compatible). Requires: pip install openai

mock._comment: No-op mock provider for testing. No dependencies needed.

_comment: Multi-provider LLM agent configuration. Edit this file to switch models or add API keys.
